response.justification: Strong senior fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent roles at Google and Meta demonstrate work with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid foundation in testing/TDD, multiple languages, and architecture. Some concerns around Nest.js not being explicitly mentioned and resume credibility flags worth verifying in interview.
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent/MCP tooling at Google
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
Polyglot engineer with Java, Kotlin-adjacent JVM exposure, and deep multi-language experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention; Kotlin not listed in skills
Overlapping concurrent employment dates (Amazon 'Founder' role running in parallel with Google/Meta/RIDE) raises clarification questions
German only basic — may matter depending on team language requirements

key_factors.factor: Core stack match (TS/Node/React) + AI agent experience
Senior tenure at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
